company: The Surgeon General, Department of the Army (TSG-DA)
intended_use: The APPRAISE-HRI is a mobile health app intended to provide a means for military healthcare providers to screen U.S. Service members for hemorrhage risk after a physically traumatic event and stratify
intended_use_full: The APPRAISE-HRI is a mobile health app intended to provide a means for military healthcare providers to screen U.S. Service members for hemorrhage risk after a physically traumatic event and stratify casualties who need immediate attention and emergency evacuation from those who are injured but may not be at risk for hemorrhage.
ground_truth: Trauma registry data including blood transfusion information, documented hemorrhagic injuries, clinical notes, ICD-10 codes, and Abbreviated Injury Scale (AIS) codes; patients labeled as Hemorrhage patients (n=543) or Control patients (n=5,352)
other_metrics: Likelihood Ratio for HRI Level I: 0.18 [95% CI 0.12, 0.26]; Likelihood Ratio for HRI Level II: 0.70 [95% CI 0.63, 0.76]; Likelihood Ratio for HRI Level III: 6.88 [95% CI 6.04, 7.84]
